name: ROI dashboard: attribution charts and modeled revenue
description: The campaign Results tab leads with charts — signup attribution donut, conversion comparison, momentum — plus an interactive value-per-signup control that recomputes modeled revenue live.

planSteps.description: Open the ReelMatrix web app, go to Campaigns, open the active campaign, and switch to its Results tab.
Verify a 'Where signups come from' section renders with a donut chart and a ranked bar chart of signups by platform, plus a sentence naming the strongest channel.

Verify a 'Which platform converts best' section renders a grouped bar chart of conversion rates, and a 'Momentum' section renders a cumulative area chart (or an explanatory empty note if fewer than two posts shipped).
Verify a 'Modeled pipeline' stat tile is visible and a 'Modeled revenue by platform' section shows a 'Value per signup' slider.
Move the 'Value per signup' slider to a clearly different value.
Verify the 'Modeled pipeline' tile and the modeled revenue chart update immediately to reflect the new value, and the honesty caption 'Modeled: live signup counts × your value per signup' is present.
Verify 'Post-level detail' is collapsed by default, and expands to show per-platform post tables when clicked.
Verify a 'Route wins to your stack' card shows Linear and Webhook options whose send buttons stay disabled until a key or URL is entered.
